inquiries.query:
/*Question:
We're going to check that all skills that do not have a category assigned to it. This can be used for validating data.
So, get all skills from the skills_dim table that don't have a type classification assigned to them. Return the skill_id and skills
*/
SELECT 
	skill_id,
    skills,
    type
FROM 
	skills_dim
WHERE
	type <> 'other'
GROUP BY
	skill_id
inquiries.name: 25_02_26_prblm1
